problem id: c869b4f6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  01110100 -> 00111010
  11101100 -> 01110110
  10001001 -> 00000100
  00001010 -> 10000101
  10110011 -> 10011001
  10001011 -> 10000101
  00100111 -> 11010011
  00100001 -> 01010000
  10011001 -> 00001100

query: 10100011
predicted answer: 10010001
